name: Selfhosted Comic Reader Source
subtitle: Unofficial native iOS client for self-hosted Kavita servers
description: A native SwiftUI iOS app for reading a self-hosted Kavita (comics/manga server) library, with offline downloads, a real page-curl reader, and double-page spreads on iPad/landscape.

apps.name: Selfhosted Comic Reader
apps.subtitle: Read your self-hosted Kavita library
apps.localizedDescription: A native SwiftUI iOS app for reading a self-hosted Kavita (comics/manga server) library over OPDS and Kavita's native API. Features a real UIKit page-curl reader with double-page spreads in landscape, offline chapter/series downloads, drag-to-multiselect chapter management, an ambient blurred-poster background, and optional local notifications when a fully-read series gets a new chapter.

versions.localizedDescription: added comicvine api, fixed notifications and added a widget.
